title: Analysis of rod/cone gap junctions from the reconstruction of mouse photoreceptor terminals
abstract: Reconstructed gap junctions between photoreceptors in mouse retina using SBF-SEM and FIB-SEM, finding that rod/cone coupling via ~80 Cx36 channels accounts for nearly all photoreceptor gap junctions, with 25% of channels open at rest.
notes: Last author (Massey) and first author (Ishibashi) are seed experts. Associated with bossDB dataset.
